{

"judge_id": "judge_2024_10_25",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

},
"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "Identifies key conceptual issues like overclaiming and blinding, proposes tighter framing but doesn't fully reframe.",
  "R1.2": "Flags localized consistency issues like unclear arithmetic and editorial phrasing but doesn't walk the full argument chain.",
  "RX.1": "Effectively flags uncertainty in claims and suggests necessary hedging or additional data.",
  "RX.3": "Generally within scope with minor drifts into broader paper issues.",
  "RX.4": "Identifies potential harms and suggests mitigations without introducing new issues.",
  "RX.5": "Points out traceability gaps but doesn't annotate all changes with sources."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.1": 0.85,
  "R1.2": 0.8,
  "RX.1": 0.9,
  "RX.3": 0.85,
  "RX.4": 0.95,
  "RX.5": 0.75
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies key conceptual issues like overclaiming and blinding, proposes tighter framing but doesn't fully reframe.
rationale.R1.2: Flags localized consistency issues like unclear arithmetic and editorial phrasing but doesn't walk the full argument chain.
rationale.RX.1: Effectively flags uncertainty in claims and suggests necessary hedging or additional data.
rationale.RX.3: Generally within scope with minor drifts into broader paper issues.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential harms and suggests mitigations without introducing new issues.
rationale.RX.5: Points out traceability gaps but doesn't annotate all changes with sources.
